However, egg white may be consumed in good amounts. /c63Minimize consumption of ready- to- eat fast foods, bakery foods and processed foods prepared in hydrogenated fat. /c63Use of re-heated fats and oils should be avoided. /c63Use fats and oils in moderation and consume varieties of foods to get good proportion of all fatty acids for optimal health benefits. 51 POINTS TO PONDER 52 Guideline 8 What is desirable or ideal body weight or Body Mass Index (BMI)? What is obesity? Avoid overeating to prevent overweight and obesity Rationale: /c190A dramatic increase in the prevalence of overweight and obesity among all the age groups has occurred in last 2-3 decades. /c190About 30-50% of adult Indians are either overweight or obese. /c190Overweight and obese individuals are at an
